name: I fell off ladder at work but feel fine now, should I still file?
description: Yes, get checked; symptoms can delay.

mainEntity.name: I fell off ladder at work but feel fine now, should I still file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, get checked; symptoms can delay.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, file anyway; delayed symptoms like back pain often emerge days later.**

Adrenaline masks injuries; records protect future claims. Untreated issues worsen.

- Get evaluated even if minor.
- Report establishes timeline.
- No cost for comp-covered care.

Many regret ignoring; Utah courts compensate aggravated idiopathic falls.[1]
